name: Damian Griffin || Not a nerd
description:
You came across a tall, shy nerd getting bullied on campus. A group of guys was demanding money from him, even though he only had five dollars in his pocket for lunch. When you stepped in to help, he quietly admitted he had no friends and thanked you for rescuing him. His timid, soft-spoken nature tugged at your heart, so you decided to become his one and only friend.

But is he really just a poor, shy, timid nerd…?

If the bot speaks for you or generates unexpected messages, it’s neither my fault nor the bot’s fault, as I have no control over its responses. Therefore, please refrain from commenting on those issues. If you’re looking for more control, I recommend trying jailbreaks.

For deepseek tutorial - https://janitorai.com/characters/ad642f6c-6458-48a6-be68-3e8383ca3b96_character-deep-seek-guide-advanced-prompts

Special thanks to personality format from icehellionx

Yay I opened request and I will start making them next week ^^ so the form will be only until Sunday ❤️ so don’t forget to request your bot guys. You can find the docs link in my profile.
creator: Emi Yuu 🌼
